data.title: After DeepSeek Shook Wall Street, China's Baidu Gears Up For AI Battle With Next-Gen Ernie 5.0 Launch In Late 2025
data.description: In the face of rising competition in the artificial intelligence (AI) market, Chinese tech giant, Baidu, is preparing to roll out its next-generation AI model later this year.

data.title: Ex-Google CEO Eric Schmidt Warns If West Doesn't Get Its Act Together On Open Source AI, China Will Become The Leader: 'If We Don't Do Something...'
data.description: Former Google CEO Eric Schmidt warned that Western nations risk falling behind China in AI leadership if they do not prioritize open-source models, emphasizing the need for balanced development amid rising global competition.

data.title: Tesla's $400 Million Armored Cybertruck Deal Under Fire As Short Seller Jim Chanos Questions Elon Musk's DOGE Role In Cutting 'Wasteful Government Spending'
data.description: Prominent short-seller Jim Chanos called into question a potential $400 million government contract for Tesla's armored Cybertrucks on Wednesday, linking it to CEO Elon Musk's recent appointment to lead government efficiency initiatives.

data.title: Apple Intelligence Rollout In China And Europe To Boost iPhone Sales, Says Deepwater's Gene Munster
data.description: Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) is set to introduce artificial intelligence (AI) features in China in collaboration with Alibaba Group Holdings (NYSE: BABA), a move that could potentially stimulate iPhone sales growth in the region, following a challenging period of declining sales.

data.title: Apple Supplier Foxconn Considers Buying Nissan Shares, But Only If An EV Deal Is In Place
data.description: Foxconn Technology Group, Apple Inc.'s primary iPhone manufacturer, confirmed Wednesday it would consider acquiring Renault's stake in Nissan Motor Co. as part of a broader strategy to expand its electric vehicle manufacturing business.
